_comment: Phones are RPG gear. tier gates smart features (maps/intel/remote ops - future). trace is how easily police can track/intercept you (0-100, higher = worse); a burner is anonymous-but-dumb, a stock smartphone is capable-but-tracked. Only graphene_supported models (Pixhell = Pixel parody, the only phones real GrapheneOS runs on) can flash GraphineOS, which drops trace hard while keeping the tier. battery is % and drains per trip; wired charges faster, wireless is the convenience tradeoff. Parody brand names kept safe + funny.

phones.name: Burner flip
phones.note: Cash-bought, anonymous. Dumb: no maps, no apps, no wireless charging.

phones.name: Crickett prepaid Android
phones.note: Account-linked. The carrier logs every tower you ping.

phones.name: iFruit SE
phones.note: Locked ecosystem. Cloud backups a DA can subpoena.

phones.name: Pixhell 6a
phones.note: Stock OS tracks you hard, but it can run GraphineOS.

phones.name: Samsdiscount Galaxa S
phones.note: Bloatware phones home constantly. Slick, though.

phones.name: Pixhell 9 Pro
phones.note: Flagship. Flash GraphineOS and you're a ghost with a good camera.
